message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Extend the confidentiality obligations beyond two years.",
      "leverage": "Longer confidentiality periods are common in industries where sensitive information is shared.",
      "proposed_language": "These confidentiality obligations shall survive for a period of five (5) years after the termination of this Agreement.",
      "rationale": "Extending the confidentiality period protects both parties' sensitive information for a longer duration, which is crucial in competitive markets.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "objective": "Limit the indemnification clause to direct damages only.",
      "leverage": "Limiting indemnification to direct damages is a standard practice to avoid excessive liability.",
      "proposed_language": "Each party shall indemnify and hold harmless the other party from and against any direct claims, damages, and losses arising out of a breach of this Agreement by the indemnifying party.",
      "rationale": "This change reduces potential financial exposure for both parties, making the agreement more balanced.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "objective": "Increase the limitation of liability cap.",
      "leverage": "Higher caps are often negotiated to reflect the potential value of the business relationship.",
      "proposed_language": "The total liability of either party shall not exceed one hundred thousand dollars ($100,000).",
      "rationale": "Increasing the cap provides better protection for both parties in case of significant losses, reflecting the seriousness of the business relationship.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.70
    },
    {
      "objective": "Specify a dispute resolution process before litigation.",
      "leverage": "Many agreements include mediation or arbitration as a first step to resolve disputes, which can save time and costs.",
      "proposed_language": "Prior to any litigation, the Parties agree to attempt to resolve any disputes through mediation in San Francisco, California.",
      "rationale": "This addition encourages amicable resolution of disputes and can prevent costly legal battles.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.65
    },
    {
      "objective": "Clarify the definition of Confidential Information.",
      "leverage": "Clear definitions prevent misunderstandings and disputes regarding what constitutes confidential information.",
      "proposed_language": "Confidential Information does not include information that is publicly available, independently developed by the receiving party, or disclosed with the prior written consent of the disclosing party.",
      "rationale": "Clarifying the definition helps both parties understand their obligations and reduces the risk of unintentional breaches.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.80
    }
  ]
}
